structuralGaps.note: styles/dar-design-system.css created; legacy inline :root still in index.html
styles/components/ui-inputs.css maps legacy selectors; glass search uses focus-within
Spatial Premium only wired in test/index.html; live index.html still emoji nav
~1900 theme-specific layout overrides remain inline; radius/spacing aliased
Contrast rules exist per theme but not centralized

nextPhases: Phase 2: finish token extraction from inline CSS
Phase 4: pilot Home, Mehr, Bottom Nav, Quran, global search in Dar Test
Phase 7: publish same commit to visitor app after Dar Test sign-off
